title: Watch Out Bro
description: A Warning Overlay To Show When Creepers Are Nearby
body:
A mod made for Reddit User u/idiot770, based on [this Reddit Post](https://www.reddit.com/r/feedthebeast/comments/1s7vnwv/is_there_a_mod_to_gently_warn_me_of_a_creeper_in/?utm_source=share&utm_medium=web3x&utm_name=web3xcss&utm_term=1&utm_content=share_button)

It simply puts an overlay on screen whenever a Creeper is within 12 blocks of the player. I slightly modified the original post's UI to avoid covering the center of the screen so much, but it's mostly the exact same.

I believe it should be client-sided, but I made it in like 5 minutes as a joke so I very well could have messed it up. Regardless, I don't think anybody would be using it anyways, so not a huge loss.
